caption: A person's hands are seen mixing a bowl of popcorn that has been coated in white and green substances. In the upper left and right frames, the hand is positioned at the top of the bowl, pushing the popcorn downward. As the sequence progresses to the bottom frames, the hand moves lower and sweeps across the bottom of the bowl to stir the contents. A small, circular inset window in each frame shows a blonde woman wearing a dark blue V-neck shirt, looking toward the camera. The scene is set indoors, with a wooden surface visible beneath the bowl. Each frame features a logo and text in the top left corner that reads "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION". The popcorn is contained within a wide, greyish-green bowl, and several unpopped kernels are scattered at the bottom.
